hero.subtitle: A recipe loved across every continent. Now on-chain, with a 1,000-year community testing it. Fair launch. No presale. No VC.

story.intro: Plov didn't belong to one place. It appeared, independently, wherever fire met grain and meat met spice. A universal recipe written not by one chef, but by humanity itself.

milestones.title: The First Pot
milestones.text: Rice meets fire in clay vessels. The recipe is born — different in every village, the same at heart.

milestones.title: The Spread
milestones.text: Trade routes carry the recipe across continents. Saffron, lamb, dried fruit, chicken, vegetables. Each version authentic.

milestones.title: UNESCO Heritage
milestones.text: Recognized as humanity's intangible cultural heritage — not because one place owns it, but because everyone does. A shared recipe carried across cultures.

milestones.title: On-Chain
milestones.text: A recipe that survived 1,000 years of distributed consensus moves to Solana. Same philosophy, new technology. Open source, transparent, multisig-protected.

manifesto.intro: Most memecoins are jokes told once. We're building something that already passed the test — a cultural artifact that survived for centuries because it actually works.

items.title: Culture First
items.body: Most tokens borrow a cute mascot and call it a day. We're rooted in something older — a recipe that connects strangers across continents. Real story, real heritage, real meaning.
items.quote: If your meme needs explaining, it isn't one yet.

items.title: Fair Launch
items.body: No presale. No private round. No insider allocations. No VCs at a discount. Everyone gets the same shot, at the same price, at the same time. The token launches the way a community potluck starts — open to all who show up.
items.quote: Same fire, same kazan, same chance.

items.title: Transparent & Multisig-Protected
items.body: 45% of supply goes to airdrops over four waves. Just 8% for the team, fully vested over 24 months. Mint authority disabled forever. Liquidity protected. Treasury operations require Squads multisig with role-based thresholds and timelocks.
items.quote: The one who cooks it shouldn't own it. It belongs to those who share it.

tokenomics.intro: Every ingredient in its place. 45% goes to the community through PlovDrop — the largest allocation. No presale, no private sale, no VC rounds.
tokenomics.largestBody: PlovDrop across four waves — more than Liquidity, Marketing, and Team combined.

roadmap.intro: Every dish has phases. Ingredients, preparation, fire, serving. Same with $PLOV — a deliberate sequence, not a hype pump.

phases.name: Phase 0
phases.subtitle: Foundation
items: Token deployed on Solana (mint & freeze disabled)

security.intro: Every treasury operation is on-chain, multi-signed, and published. No hidden wallets. No secret allocations. Everything verifiable on Solana.

cards.title: Squads Multisig
cards.body: Treasury and sensitive operations run through Squads multisig with role-based thresholds (4/7 for Treasury; 3/5 for LP, Marketing, Updates, Burns) and timelocks. Exact safes and settings are published on Proof-hub.

cards.title: Proof-hub
cards.body: Every action is on-chain and published with transaction hashes, addresses, and timestamps. No private allocations. Everything verifiable on Solana.

cards.title: Security Review
cards.body: Independent security review process initiated with external auditors. Results will be published on Proof-hub when finalized. We do not claim any audit completion until officially confirmed.

security.bannerRest: Engagement with external auditors is underway. Results will be published on
security.bannerTail: when finalized. We do not claim any audit completion until officially confirmed by the auditor.

community.intro: Every plov is shared. Ours is no different. Whichever channel you're on, we're there.
community.finalTitle: Pull up a seat at the table

footer.antiPhishText: Official URLs only — plovcoin.com and claim.plovcoin.com. Never enter your seed phrase. We will never DM you first.
footer.briefDesc: Fair launch memecoin on Solana. 45% to community. Mint=OFF. No presale, no VC.
footer.riskText: $PLOV is a memecoin with no inherent utility or expectation of profit. Cryptocurrency investments are highly volatile and may result in total loss of capital. Nothing on this site constitutes financial, legal, or investment advice. Not available in restricted jurisdictions. Do your own research. Past performance does not indicate future results. Compliance with local laws is the sole responsibility of the participant.

proof.intro: Every action on-chain. Every address public. Every transaction verifiable. No private wallets. No hidden allocations.
proof.placeholderNote: Data will be published progressively as TGE approaches (June 2026). Sensitive operations and scheduled transparency updates will be published here on a defined cadence.
proof.verifyText: Once published, every address and transaction here links directly to Solscan. You don't need to trust us — verify on-chain.

whitepaper.title: Whitepaper
whitepaper.intro: Fair launch, broad distribution, protected launch liquidity, and transparency through Proof-hub. This website whitepaper is designed for community readers, partners, and exchanges: concise, factual, and easy to verify.

mintOff.title: Mint = OFF
mintOff.desc: No new tokens can be minted

whitepaper.disclaimerText: Cryptoassets are unregulated and can fall in value. Capital at risk. No inherent utility. This content is not financial advice. Tax on profits may apply. DYOR.

overview.title: Project Overview
overview.lead: PlovCoin ($PLOV) is a cultural memecoin on Solana with fixed supply and public launch structure. The project is built around a recognizable cultural symbol, broad community distribution, protected launch liquidity, and transparency through Proof-hub.
coreIdea: Fair launch — no presale, no private sale
Launch liquidity protection with public verification
overview.formatNote: Live addresses, transactions, and logs are published separately on Proof-hub — keeping this document compact and up-to-date.

why.title: Why PlovCoin
points: Plov is a recognizable cultural symbol of hospitality and the shared table.
A cultural symbol tends to hold up better over time than a random meme character.
The project doesn't rely on borrowed IP and isn't tied to a single fleeting trend.
PlovArmy forms around a shared symbol, not just a ticker.

wpTokenomics.title: Tokenomics
wpTokenomics.lead: Fixed supply, distributed transparently. 45% of supply goes to the community through PlovDrop airdrop waves — the largest allocation in the protocol.

allocations.label: Liquidity
allocations.logic: Meteora DLMM (T0) → Raydium CPMM (T+7) → Orca CLMM (T+30); launch liquidity protection

wpTokenomics.fairLaunchText: For $PLOV, fair launch means: no presale, no private sale, no hidden preferential allocations, and no discounted pricing for early insiders. Token access is available through the public DEX market and officially announced airdrop waves.
wpTokenomics.vestingText: Team tokens are not unlocked at launch. The unlock begins only after a 12-month cliff, followed by 12 months of linear vesting. All sensitive operations go through Squads multisig and timelock.

liquidity.title: Liquidity & Launch

archStages.desc: Optimization based on aggregator data and deeper liquidity

liquidity.protectionText: For compatible pool models, LP token burn may be used; for position-based DLMM/CLMM models, a lock / timelock / non-withdrawable custody design applies. The specific launch scheme and transaction confirmations are published on Proof-hub.
liquidity.cexNote: CEX listings follow a Tier-2 first approach: gradual expansion based on organic demand, liquidity depth, and community metrics. No paid listings. No market maker wash-trading.

airdrops.title: Airdrops & Hold-to-Earn
airdrops.lead: 45% of supply is distributed to the community through four airdrop waves over 12 months. Every wave is verified on-chain with SHA-256 hashes published on Proof-hub.
airdrops.antiSybilText: Address deduplication, minimum on-chain SOL balance, on-chain activity thresholds for later waves, and public SHA-256 / IPFS CIDs on Proof-hub. The only official claim domain is claim.plovcoin.com.
airdrops.loyaltyNote: Important: this is not a staking contract and not a lockup. Tokens stay in your wallet; the bonus is calculated through on-chain snapshots.

marketing.title: Marketing & Community
challengePoints: UGC virality around plov and memes
Short-form content for TikTok / Reels / Shorts
marketing.kolText: All paid placements are marked #ad / #sponsored. No yield promises, no buy signals. For UK/EU audiences, a risk disclaimer is added. All placements are logged in the Ad Registry on Proof-hub.
labPoints: Export to X / TikTok / Instagram / Telegram
AI tools assist with routine and analytics but don't replace governance

governance.title: Governance & Transparency
governance.transitionalText: Before the formal DAO, the project is run through the Core Team, Squads multisig, timelocks, and public operating rules. The community contributes through discussions, polls, and feedback. After Phase 2, governance authority may be expanded.
transparencyPoints: Proof-hub is the single public source of truth: addresses, transactions, burn logs, airdrop hashes, MEV log, marketing and charity flows.
In Launch-Ready mode, Proof-hub publishes addresses, rules, operational procedures, and future campaign IDs.
In Live mode, Proof-hub is updated post-factum after each sensitive operation.
Monthly #PlovTransparency report includes Squads balances, liquidity KPIs, burns, airdrop status, and charity updates.

risks.title: Security & Risks

rows.mitigation: DLMM range, CLMM depth, slippage KPIs

risks.deskText: security@plovcoin.com • PGP key on Proof-hub • bug bounty rewards may be offered for confirmed critical issues. Incident protocol: initial post ≤ 60 minutes, updates every 6–8 hours, followed by AMA and post-mortem.

wpRoadmap.title: Roadmap

rows.goals: TGE preparation, final whitepaper, AI toolchain, utility bots, Telegram automation
TGE, launch liquidity protection, Wave 1, Meteora DLMM, DEX launch
Waves 2–3, hold-to-earn launch, Tier-2 CEX push, KOL partnerships, Milestone Burn #1
50K+ holders target, Milestone Burn #2, Tier-1 prep, AI MemeLab v1, charity report
Wave 4, Kazan Genesis NFT (if criteria are met), multichain R&D, 100K holders, Burn #3

wpRoadmap.note: Readiness over urgency. If security, liquidity, legal, or infrastructure blocks require more time, the launch is postponed. Better to ship slower than to repair trust live on stage.

Target: June 2026. Exact date announced 2 weeks before launch. Follow @PlovTeam on X or PlovCoinOfficial on Telegram.

items.a: No. $PLOV is a standard SPL token with zero transfer fees.
No. Hold-to-Earn is based on on-chain snapshots. Tokens stay in your wallet — no contract interaction required.
Yes — team members use consistent pseudonyms. Core operations require Squads multisig approval (4/7 threshold, 24–72h timelock).

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: Everything you need to know about PlovCoin — from buying tokens to understanding our launch structure. Can't find your answer? Reach out on Telegram.

items.a: PlovCoin ($PLOV) is a cultural memecoin on Solana with fixed supply and transparent launch structure. It's built around plov — a universal symbol of hospitality and the shared table.

Plov is recognized across dozens of cultures as a symbol of hospitality, community, and the shared table. A cultural symbol tends to hold up better over time than a random meme character, and it doesn't rely on borrowed IP.

items.q: Is this a serious project or just a meme?
items.a: Both. PlovCoin is a memecoin — no inherent utility, no yield promises. But operationally, we run it with serious discipline: Squads multisig, on-chain transparency via Proof-hub, monthly reporting, and compliant marketing.
PlovArmy is the PlovCoin community — a growing group of holders, creators, and supporters united around the plov symbol. It lives on Telegram, X, TikTok, Instagram, and Discord.

items.q: Is PlovCoin tied to a specific region or country?
items.a: No. Plov is shared across dozens of cultures from Central Asia to the Middle East to the Mediterranean. PlovCoin celebrates the universal symbol, not any single regional claim.

A 7-person core team using consistent pseudonyms (Chef Kazan, Rais-Barbaris, Brevno, Master Rice, Madam Zira, Don Luk, Trader Plovassio). Core operations require Squads multisig approval. See the Team section in the Whitepaper.
Fixed supply of 13,013,003,000 $PLOV tokens. No new tokens can ever be minted.
Yes. Mint = OFF. The mint authority is permanently disabled. You can verify this on Solscan using the official mint address.
Yes. Freeze = OFF. No address can be frozen by the project. You can verify this on Solscan.
45% PlovDrop airdrop, 20% liquidity, 15% marketing, 8% team (with 12-month cliff + 12-month vesting), 7% burn reserve, 5% loyalty rewards. See Tokenomics section in Whitepaper for full breakdown.

Yes. 7% of supply (910,910,210 tokens) is reserved for burns: milestone burns at specific holder thresholds, plus discretionary quarterly burns. All burns are verified on-chain and published on Proof-hub.
Target launch: June 2026. Exact date announced 2 weeks before TGE. Follow @PlovTeam on X or PlovCoinOfficial on Telegram for updates.
At TGE, $PLOV launches on Meteora DLMM. At T+7, we expand to Raydium CPMM. At T+30, we add Orca CLMM. Use Jupiter for best routing across all DEX.

items.q: Is there a tax on buy/sell?
items.a: No. $PLOV is a standard SPL token with zero transfer fees.

items.q: What is the official token address?
items.a: B4LhtMwbKh8D1nfj7dE6FefKpg7U2qkbYC371DBcJq9x — always verify before any interaction. Any other address claiming to be $PLOV is a scam.

items.q: How do I avoid buying a fake PlovCoin?
items.a: Always verify the token mint address matches: B4LhtMwbKh8D1nfj7dE6FefKpg7U2qkbYC371DBcJq9x. Use Jupiter or direct DEX links from plovcoin.com — never trust random Telegram/Discord links.
Our KPI target is slippage p90 < 1.0% on $1,000 trades within 30 days post-TGE. See Liquidity & Launch section for full metrics.
PlovDrop is our airdrop program — 45% of total supply distributed through 4 waves over 12 months. It's the largest allocation in the protocol.

items.q: How do I qualify for an airdrop?
items.a: Eligibility criteria vary by wave but generally include on-chain SOL balance, wallet age, Solana ecosystem activity, and community participation. Full criteria for each wave published 1 week before that wave opens.
Only on claim.plovcoin.com. Any other URL claiming to be a PlovCoin claim site is phishing. We will never DM you a claim link.
Wave 1: Q2 2026. Wave 2: Q3 2026. Wave 3: Q3–Q4 2026. Wave 4: Q2 2027. Each wave opens for a limited time.
We use address deduplication, minimum on-chain SOL balance, on-chain activity thresholds for later waves, and publish SHA-256 / IPFS hashes on Proof-hub for full transparency.

items.q: Is Hold-to-Earn the same as staking?
items.a: No. Hold-to-Earn has no staking contract, no lockup, no token deposit. Tokens stay in your wallet — you just need to hold them. Bonuses are calculated through on-chain snapshots.
Bronze (30+ days): +5%. Silver (90+ days): +10%. Gold (180+ days): +20% + priority. Diamond (365+ days): +35% + access to future phases.

items.q: What do I need to do to earn bonuses?
items.a: Nothing — just hold $PLOV in your wallet. On-chain snapshots track your holding duration automatically. Bonuses are distributed during designated snapshots.

items.q: Where do Hold-to-Earn bonuses come from?
items.a: From the 5% Loyalty Rewards allocation (650,650,150 tokens) — set aside specifically for this program.
Security audit review has been initiated. Full audit report will be published on Proof-hub before TGE.
All treasury operations go through Squads multisig with 4/7 threshold and 24–72h timelock. No single person can move funds. See Governance section for all thresholds.

items.q: What about MEV and sniper bots?
items.a: We use Jito bundles + quiet windows during launch to mitigate MEV. Full strategy published on Proof-hub.

items.q: How do I report a security issue?
items.a: Email security@plovcoin.com. PGP key available on Proof-hub. Bug bounty rewards may be offered for confirmed critical issues. Response protocol: initial reply ≤ 60 minutes.

items.q: Why does the team use pseudonyms?
items.a: Memecoin culture favors pseudonymity, and our canonical roster (Chef Kazan, Rais-Barbaris, etc.) has been consistent since the project started. Accountability comes from multisig thresholds and on-chain transparency, not from KYC.

Not yet. Before the formal DAO, the project is run through the Core Team, Squads multisig, timelocks, and public operating rules. The community contributes through discussions, polls, and feedback. After Phase 2, governance authority may be expanded.
Join PlovArmy on Telegram or Discord. Participate in #PlovChallenge UGC campaigns. KOL partnerships: contact via official channels. All paid placements are logged in our Ad Registry on Proof-hub.
